sidebar.empty: No wikis yet. Click + to create one.

empty.title: Select a Wiki page
empty.description: Pick a page from the tree on the left, or create a new Wiki with the + button.

create.title: Create Wiki
create.description: Create a new Wiki to collaborate on pages with your team.
create.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Must start with a letter or number. Auto-derived from the name until you edit it.

errors.slugTooLong: Slug must be {{max}} characters or fewer.
errors.slugPattern: Slug must start with a lowercase letter or number and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes.
errors.slugTaken: A Wiki with that slug already exists. Pick another.

settings.title: Wiki settings
settings.description: Configure how this Wiki is named, who can edit it, and how proposed changes are reviewed.
settings.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Must start with a letter or number.
settings.approvalReviewDescription: Writes land as proposals a reviewer must approve.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Archive hides this Wiki from the sidebar for everyone. The content stays on the server and an admin can restore it.

errors.slugTooLong: Slug must be {{max}} characters or fewer.
errors.slugPattern: Slug must start with a lowercase letter or number and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes.
errors.slugTaken: A Wiki with that slug already exists. Pick another.
errors.updateForbidden: You don't have permission to update this Wiki.
errors.archiveForbidden: You don't have permission to archive this Wiki.

archive.title: Archive this Wiki?
archive.description: “{{name}}” will be hidden from the sidebar for everyone. You can ask an admin to restore it later.

coverPicker.pathHelp: Paste a folder9 path. Uploads arrive in a future release.

editor.staleAlert: You have unsaved local changes. Viewing your draft.

errors.saveConflict: Save failed: the page has changed on the server. Reload and reapply your edits.
errors.saveForbidden: Save failed: you don't have permission to update this page.

page.notFound: This page doesn't exist yet: {{path}}. Select an existing page from the tree or create it in the editor.

proposalBanner.message: This page has a pending proposal awaiting review.

submitReview.title: Submit for review
submitReview.description: This Wiki requires review before changes are published. Your draft will be saved as a proposal that a reviewer can approve.
submitReview.descriptionPlaceholder: Add any context reviewers should know about this change

proposalDiff.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Let the author know why this proposal is being rejected.
proposalDiff.diffEmpty: This proposal contains no file changes.

errors.approveForbidden: You don't have permission to approve this proposal.
errors.rejectForbidden: You don't have permission to reject this proposal.

errors.wikiNotFound: Wiki not found — it may have been archived.
errors.boundaryMessage: Something went wrong — please try again.
